data.title: Goldman Sachs, Barclays and other major global banks plan to jointly launch a stablecoin project
data.description: According to market news: Major global banks plan to jointly launch a stablecoin project. Alliance members include Santander, Bank of America, Barclays, BNP Paribas, Citi, Deutsche Bank, Goldman Sachs, MUFG, TD Bank and UBS.

data.title: 0G Foundation: Registration for the second phase of airdrops is now open
data.description: The 0G Foundation announced on the X platform that registration for the second phase of the airdrop has officially opened. Testnet contributors do not need to undergo KYC. Airdrops will be automatically distributed to their wallets as the 0G team reviews appeals from testnet node operators and finalizes the on-chain airdrop data. For community participants, the second phase will allow users who were unable to complete KYC registration during the first phase to register. It will also allow users who were mistakenly omitted from the first phase, selected Discord roles, or are active Kaito users to verify their eligibility. For users who continue to encounter issues during this phase, a new appeal form will be released next week. Appeals close at 12:00 UTC+0 on Tuesday, October 14th.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Plans Special Measures to Ensure Market Stability
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that the U.S. Treasury is preparing to implement 'special measures' aimed at maintaining market stability. These actions are expected to address current economic challenges and ensure a steady financial environment. The Treasury's initiative comes amid ongoing concerns about market fluctuations and economic uncertainties. Further details on the specific measures have not been disclosed, but the move underscores the government's commitment to safeguarding the economy.

data.title: Goldman Sachs expects U.S. initial jobless claims to rise to 235,000
data.description: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. analyzed state-level data during the federal government shutdown and estimated that the number of Americans applying for unemployment benefits increased last week. Goldman Sachs economists led by Jan Hatzius said in a research note that initial jobless claims rose to 235,000 in the week ending October 4. The bank estimated the number in the previous week to be around 224,000. Goldman Sachs used seasonal factors released in advance by the U.S. Department of Labor in its calculations to adjust the available raw state-level data. Due to the federal government shutdown, the Department of Labor did not release its weekly report on Thursday, but provided downloadable data for most states. Economists also found that the estimated number of continuing unemployment claims rose slightly to 1.92 million in the week ending September 27, from 1.91 million the previous week. Goldman Sachs economists estimated initial claims in Hawaii and Massachusetts, assuming those applications were consistent with the latest released figures. (Jinshi)

data.title: The crypto sector saw mixed gains and losses at the opening of the U.S. stock market, with Coinbase rising 1.51%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, the three major US stock indices opened slightly higher, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average up 0.28%, the S&P 500 up 0.11%, and the Nasdaq up 0.07%. The crypto sector saw mixed gains and losses, with BitMine up 0.81%, Coinbase up 1.51%, SOL Strategies down 3.6%, and Circle up 0.82%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: U.S. Consumer Confidence Remains Steady in October
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Joanne Hsu, director of the University of Michigan's consumer survey, reported that U.S. consumer confidence in October remained stable, with the index recording 55 points, nearly unchanged from September. This month, consumers showed improved perceptions of their current personal financial situation and the business environment over the next year. However, expectations for future personal finances and evaluations of current conditions for purchasing durable goods declined, offsetting each other. Overall, consumers believe the economic outlook has not significantly changed compared to last month.

High prices and weak employment prospects continue to be the primary concerns for consumers, who do not anticipate significant improvements in these areas. Interviews indicate that there is little evidence so far that the ongoing federal government shutdown has altered consumer views on the economy. Meanwhile, inflation expectations for the next year have slightly decreased from 4.7% last month to 4.6% this month, though they remain elevated. Long-term inflation expectations remain stable at 3.7%.

data.title: Nasdaq-listed Antalpha Platform Holding Company led a $43 million investment in the acquisition of Prestige Wealth Inc.
data.description: Antalpha Platform Holding Company (NASDAQ: ANTA) ("Antalpha"), an institutional-grade digital asset financing platform, today announced that it has led an investment of approximately $43 million and acquired a controlling voting interest in Prestige Wealth Inc. (NASDAQ: PWM; AURE) ("Aurelion" or the "Company") through a committed private investment in a public company (PIPE). Other accredited investors included TG Commodities S.A. de C.V. ("Tether") and Kiara Capital Holding Limited ("Kiara Capital"), an investment from Antalpha's management team. Subject to approvals, the Company (NASDAQ: PWM) expects to change its name to "Aurelion Inc." and begin trading under the new ticker symbol (NASDAQ: AURE) on Monday, October 13, 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin OG whales increase their short positions on BTC and ETH, with total positions exceeding $1.1 billion
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Bitcoin's ancient whales have increased their short positions on BTC and ETH, with total positions exceeding $1.1 billion. They shorted 6,189 BTC at 10x leverage, worth approximately $752.9 million, at a forced liquidation price of $130,810. They shorted 81,203 ETH at 12x leverage, worth approximately $353.1 million, at a forced liquidation price of $4,589.3.

data.title: Morgan Stanley lifts restrictions on wealth clients holding crypto funds
data.description: Morgan Stanley has lifted restrictions on the crypto funds its wealth clients can hold, relying on automated monitoring processes to ensure clients aren't overly concentrated in this volatile asset class. A recently released model by the bank's Global Investment Committee recommends a maximum initial allocation of up to 4% to cryptocurrencies, based on objectives ranging from "wealth preservation" to "opportunistic growth." Currently, advisors are limited to recommending Bitcoin funds from BlackRock and Fidelity, but Morgan Stanley is monitoring industry trends and considering adding other cryptocurrency products. Clients can request investment in any listed cryptocurrency exchange-traded product.

data.title: The number of people worldwide with crypto assets exceeding $1 million has exceeded 240,000, a 40% increase from last year.
data.description: The number of individuals worldwide with cryptocurrency assets worth at least $1 million has reached approximately 241,700, a 40% increase from last year. This number includes 450 cryptocurrency billionaires (those with assets exceeding $100 million) and 36 cryptocurrency billionaires. Research has found that cryptocurrency investors spend approximately 9.7 cents for every $1 in cryptocurrency wealth growth, a marginal propensity to consume more than double that of gains from the stock market or real estate. The additional wealth generated by cryptocurrency gains is expected to contribute $145 billion in additional consumer spending in 2024, representing approximately 0.7% of total U.S. consumption. (CNBC)

data.title: Binance to Launch BNB Smart Chain Trading Competition with Token Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce a BNB Smart Chain Trading Competition on Binance Alpha. This event will run from 2025-10-10 16:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-24 16:00 (UTC), allowing participants to trade Ark of Panda (AOP), STBL (STBL), and Bless (BLESS) through their Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha. Eligible users can compete for exclusive token rewards during this period.

**Competition Details**

Participants will be ranked based on their cumulative trading volume of AOP, STBL, and BLESS tokens. The top traders will receive rewards according to the specified reward structure. The AOP Trading Volume Pool will distribute 8,000,000 AOP tokens equally among the top 10,000 users, with each receiving 800 AOP. Similarly, the STBL Trading Volume Pool will allocate 2,500,000 STBL tokens, and the BLESS Trading Volume Pool will share 11,000,000 BLESS tokens among the top 10,000 users, with each receiving 250 STBL and 1,100 BLESS, respectively.

**Participation Guidelines**

Only trades executed via Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha will qualify for this competition. Limit orders will receive a fourfold weighting in prize pool calculations, enhancing participants' chances of winning. There are no volume caps, and both purchases and sales during the promotion period count towards the competition. Participants can earn rewards from each trading task pool if they meet the requirements. However, transactions related to token bridging and Binance Alpha-to-Alpha trading volume are excluded from the competition.

**Terms and Conditions**

Participants must comply with Binance's terms and conditions, including account verification and holding an active Binance Wallet. Binance reserves the right to disqualify users involved in dishonest behavior or those who tamper with the program code. The platform may amend the competition terms at its discretion without prior notice.

data.title: U.S. October One-Year Inflation Rate Expected at 4.6%
data.description: According to PANews, the initial estimate for the United States' one-year inflation rate in October is projected to be 4.6%. This figure is slightly below the anticipated 4.7% and matches the previous value of 4.70%.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation: Will support Tornado Cash developers through new funding mechanism
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation announced its support for privacy through a new funding mechanism. The Ethereum Funding Coordination Team, in conjunction with the Keyring Network, has launched an initiative to introduce a new method for influencing funding within the Ethereum ecosystem. The zkVerified permissioned vault on the Keyring mainnet provides access to a compliant and privacy-preserving DeFi lending market. During the first two months, all protocol fees from the Keyring zkVerified vault will be donated to the legal defense fund of Roman Storm and Alexey Pertsev, two Tornado Cash developers currently on trial for releasing open source code. This model ensures that the vault's initial users can directly support the legal defense of privacy-focused developers.

data.title: Binance Launches Zero Fee Promotion for BTC/MXN Trading Pair
data.description: Binance is launching a new promotion with zero transaction fees for the BTC/MXN spot trading pair. The promotion runs from 08:00 on October 13, 2025, to 07:59 on November 13, 2025 (GMT+8).
